tests.name: claim statuses are explicit
tests.expected: Each major product, legal, platform, and adoption claim is labeled LIVE, RECORDED REAL RUN, LOCAL FALLBACK, ROADMAP, or DO NOT CLAIM.

tests.name: scanner capability is not overstated
tests.expected: Readiness checks 5-12 are described as static checklist or roadmap unless future scanner evidence exists.

tests.name: CLI and generated CI are not claimed
tests.expected: `npx vibeshield install` and CLI-generated GitHub Action are either ROADMAP or DO NOT CLAIM.

tests.name: legal claims remain review indicators
tests.expected: Legal and platform claims use risk-indicator language and never present compliance determinations.

tests.name: overall pass remains evidence-bound
tests.expected: The ledger cannot set overall_pass true without live or recorded demo evidence and three measured rehearsals.
